message:
feat(macros): add version and tags support to #[resource] and #[prompt] macros (bd-317z)

Both macros now support `version = "1.0.0"` and `tags = ["label1", "label2"]`
attributes, matching the parity established by the #[tool] macro. Previously
these fields were hardcoded to None/empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
